description: 12 Bhavas (Houses) — significations, karakas, classifications and interpretive rules
definition: Bhava = state of being. Houses are 12 equal 30° divisions of the celestial sphere calculated from the Ascendant (Lagna). Houses are domains of life; Signs are the qualities coloring those domains.

house_systems.name: Equal House (Vedic default)
house_systems.note: Each house = 30° from Ascendant. Preserves Rasi/Bhava 1:1 mapping.

house_systems.name: Whole Sign
house_systems.note: Rising sign = entire 1st house. Used in Hellenistic and Vedic traditions.

house_systems.name: Placidus
house_systems.note: Western; unequal houses based on rising time; fails at polar latitudes.

house_systems.name: Bhava Chalit (Sripathy)
house_systems.note: Uses actual Lagna degree as the midpoint of 1st Bhava; planets may shift houses relative to Rasi chart.

bhavas.notes: Both Kendra and Trikona — Ascendant is always auspicious. The most important house.

bhavas.body_parts: Mouth, right eye, face, nose, tongue, teeth, oral cavity
Arms, shoulders, hands, neck, collarbones, right ear, respiratory organs, thyroid
bhavas.notes: Upachaya (growth) house — malefics do well here; 3rd is Jeeva Shakti (life force).

bhavas.body_parts: Heart, chest, lungs, diaphragm, blood circulation

significations: Cinema, drama, arts, falling from position
bhavas.body_parts: Upper abdomen, stomach, liver, pancreas, spleen, gallbladder, small intestine
bhavas.notes: Trikona / Lakshmi Sthana — strong Poorva Punya house.

bhavas.english: House of Enemies, Debts and Diseases
bhavas.notes: Dusthana AND Upachaya — malefics (Mars, Saturn) can actually perform well here (defeat enemies). Karakas: Mars for litigation/debt, Saturn for chronic disease.

bhavas.body_parts: Below waist, pelvic region, reproductive organs
bhavas.notes: Kendra AND Maraka — both foundational and dangerous for longevity.
Dusthana. 8th is also Jeeva Shakti. Generally avoid for benefic placements but essential for spiritual/occult work.
Best of the Trikonas — Lakshmi Sthana. Most auspicious house for blessings.
Kendra + Upachaya — the 'mid-heaven' house (MC). All four natural significators (Sun, Jupiter, Mercury, Saturn) apply.
Dusthana — weakest for material but supports spiritual progress.

kendra.name: Angular / Quadrant / 'Four Pillars'
kendra.rule: Planets here perform powerfully. Malefics do well. Natural benefics lose some beneficence (Kendradhipathi Dosa), malefics lose some maleficence.

trikona.name: Trines / 'Houses of Fortune'
trikona.rule: Most auspicious. Both benefic and malefic lords give auspicious results when they rule Trikonas.

upachaya.name: Growth Houses
upachaya.rule: Results improve over time. Malefics (Sun, Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu) perform especially well.

dusthana_trika.name: Challenging Houses
dusthana_trika.rule: Areas of struggle. Benefics here are softened; malefics can strengthen 6th (defeating enemies).

maraka.name: Death-Inflicting Houses
maraka.rule: 12th from 3rd and 8th (Jeeva Shakti). Activate in specific Dasha periods; used in longevity analysis.

trishadayadhisha.name: Evil Houses
trishadayadhisha.rule: Lords of these houses give inauspicious results.

parashraya.name: Dependent Houses
parashraya.rule: Results depend on association with other planets. Order of beneficence: 12 > 2 > 8. 8th lord is least auspicious alone (12th from 9th).

apoklima_cadent.name: Cadent / Declining
apoklima_cadent.rule: Weakest (except 9th which is Trikona). 9th is the best cadent.

house_lordship_principles: Lord of 1st is always auspicious (Kendra + Trikona).
Kendra lords: benefics lose some beneficence, malefics lose some maleficence (Kendradhipathi Dosa).
Trikona lords: always auspicious (both benefic and malefic).
If a planet lords both a Kendra and a Trikona = Yogakaraka (Rajayoga).
8th lord is inauspicious (12th from Dharma 9th), unless also owns a Trikona.

kendradhipathi_dosa_lagnas.note: Natural benefics ruling Kendras in these 4 dual-sign Lagnas lose their beneficence (but still remain benefic). 1st lord is exempt if it also owns a Trikona.

badhaka_rule.description: Badhaka = the obstructing house. Rule varies by Lagna type.

bhavat_bhavam_rule.principle: Examine a house by treating it as Ascendant and counting the same house-count from itself. Each house understood by the same relative house counted from itself.

chart_analysis_first_steps: 1. House Rasi — which sign occupies it
2. House Lord — the planet ruling that sign, its placement
